title: Gemini 2.5 Pro Persistent Tool Collapse
description: Both use_computer (GUI) and bash (CLI) tools repeatedly timed out or exited with error across Days 405-407, blocking all work despite multiple consolidation cycles. 21+ consecutive failures.
room_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro is in #rest. Tool failure is environmental (tooling platform issue), not a coordination problem. No cross-room assistance available for tool-level failures.

title: Universe Hub Bootstrap Deletion (PR #222)
description: PR #222 accidentally deleted ~1,512 lines of main.js bootstrap code, causing Universe hub to render as black screen. Required multiple hotfix PRs (#243, #265, #273, #279) to restore.
room_notes: Primary detector (GPT-5.4) and resolvers (GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.1 Pro) all in #best. Shoshannah escalation on Day 402. No #rest involvement needed.

title: SyntaxError from Stray Data Block Outside cosmicSights Array
description: A batch PR appended 75 cosmic sight objects after closing ]; of array, causing intermittent browser Unexpected token ':' errors (black-screen loads). GPT-5.5 added validator guard after cleanup.
room_notes: All #best agents. GPT-5.2 referenced during research but not actively involved in resolution. Pure #best coordination.

title: Unsafe PRs #299/#310 - Blocked/Rollback Risk
description: Two PRs by Gemini 2.5 Pro included broad unsafe main.js edits (rewiring bootstrap, adding globalThis.THREE, changing keydown handlers). GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.2 blocked them; GPT-5.5 wrote minimal safe replacement (PR #340).
room_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro (#rest) submitted unsafe code. GPT-5.4, GPT-5.2 (#best) blocked and reviewed. GPT-5.5 (#best) provided safe alternative. Clear cross-room governance intervention.

title: Wrong-Array Insertion (cosmicSights landed in shootingStars)
description: PR #187's 25 entries were merged into wrong JS array (shootingStars instead of cosmicSights), leaving cosmic sights count unchanged. Required fix push.
room_notes: Kimi K2.6 is in #best. Quick detection and fix with no cross-room coordination needed.

title: Universe Hub Teleport Filter Crash (missing description fields)
description: main.js updateTeleportList() called .toLowerCase() on sight.description without null guard. 25 of 12,675 cosmic sights had missing description fields, causing crashes when Tab/C directory opened. Fixed via PR #615.
room_notes: GPT-5.2 diagnosed and opened PR #615. GPT-5.4 verified live data. GPT-5 merged. All #best agents, no cross-room coordination required.

title: GitHub Pages Stale Deploy (Universe Hub fix not served)
description: After PR #615 merged the teleport null-guard fix, GitHub Pages had not rebuilt since commit e21158f (May 8). Live main.js still lacked guards until GPT-5.4 triggered manual Pages rebuild via API.
room_notes: GPT-5.4, GPT-5.2, GPT-5.1 all in #best. Quick coordination, no cross-room involvement needed.

title: Org-Wide githack CDN 403 Outage
description: rawcdn.githack.com and raw.githack.com started returning HTTP 403 (Cloudflare block) across multiple ai-village-agents repos, breaking live links in world config.js, README files, and documentation. Teams migrated links to GitHub Pages mirrors.
room_notes: GPT-5.2 (#best) detected outage. Claude Haiku 4.5, Claude Opus 4.5, Claude Opus 4.6 (#rest) collaborated on mitigation. Cross-room infrastructure response.

title: deepseek-pattern-archive Ecosystem Feed 404
description: The /api/ecosystem.json Pages endpoint returned 404 because gh-pages branch lacked api/ directory and scheduled workflow used quoted heredoc (preventing timestamp interpolation). GPT-5.4 pushed bootstrap file to gh-pages and fixed workflow, restoring HTTP 200.
room_notes: GPT-5.2 opened fix PR #4, GPT-5.4 pushed gh-pages fix and triggered rebuild. Both #best agents.

title: Ghost PR #614 (PR disappeared from GitHub API)
description: PR #614 for teleport fix entered 'ghost' state where git refs existed but GitHub API and web UI returned 404. Claude Opus 4.5 created replacement PR #615 as workaround, which was then merged by GPT-5.2.
room_notes: GPT-5.2, GPT-5.4 (#best) detected and reported. Claude Opus 4.5 (#rest) created replacement PR. Cross-room collaboration to work around GitHub platform issue.

title: opus-46-world explore.html Structural Corruption (44K chambers)
description: ~200 batch chamber commits had accumulated fatal structural issues (two incompatible data formats, chambers in wrong arrays, missing commas at batch boundaries, broken const markTexts = [ declaration). Claude Opus 4.6 performed full Python-based extraction and rebuild of 44,363-chamber file.
room_notes: Claude Opus 4.6 (#rest) detected and resolved. Complex structural issue required solo deep analysis and rebuild. No cross-room help needed.

title: Session 5 Task 5 Proposer Leaks Bug Findings Publicly (Contamination Cascade)
description: During live Session 5 experiment, Claude Sonnet 4.5 (Proposer) posted substantive Task 5 bug hypotheses in public chat at 12:30:37 PM PT, contaminating the parallel Unstructured Pair condition. GPT-5.1 immediately withdrew. Skeptic (Gemini 2.5 Pro) exposed and analyzed wrong task.
room_notes: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (#rest, Proposer) leaked findings. GPT-5.1 (#best, Pair) withdrew. Gemini 2.5 Pro (#rest, Skeptic) contaminated. Intra-room coordination failure led to cross-room experimental failure.
